misc: Known for bomb drives despite his advanced age.
Finally made his first hole-in-one on May 24th, 2025, after 20 years of trying.
biography: Harri, affectionately known in golfing circles as "the doctor", brings a wealth of experience to the greens of the Hector Trophée. Representing Hattula Golf, Harri's participation in the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026 marks his seventh appearance in this esteemed tournament.

Despite his advanced age, Harri remains a formidable competitor, renowned for his bomb drives that continue to surprise and challenge his younger counterparts. His unwavering dedication to the sport is evident in his long-sought achievement of a hole-in-one on May 24th, 2025, a feat realized after two decades of persistent pursuit.

With two past Hector Trophée victories under his belt, Harri is a force to be reckoned with. Though the Victor Trophy has eluded him thus far, his consistent performance and strategic prowess make him a perennial contender. The golfing community eagerly anticipates his performance in the upcoming tournament, where he aims to add another chapter to his already impressive legacy.
